## Checklist

- [ ] One payload per line
- [ ] UTF-8 with LF line endings
- [ ] `#` comments explain the technique
- [ ] No real credentials or PII (all entries must be synthetic)
- [ ] Added to the appropriate existing file, or new file if new technique
